title: 部落与弯刀 Sands of Salzaar
description:
v1.2 Shatter to Reforge

• Added a story arc for Berserkers, featuring three distinct story paths and all-new skill trees.

• Added a brand-new heroes interaction feature. Each character has their own story, and you can uncover these connections through their dialogues.

• Added random backstories and dialogues for procedurally generated characters.

• Added a keyboard control mode for combat. This can be enabled in the Hotkey Settings.

• Improved the attack speed system. Attack speed now affects most skills, and troops benefit from it too!

Об игреThis is a fantastical tale of an exotic land. The Old Empire has fallen, leaving rival tribes to fight for control of the great desert. Little do they know of the seeds of darkness which grow in the shadows with each passing day...

Witness a world in constant flux, driven by living systems where every playthrough offers a unique experience. Forge grand alliances, master the markets, or walk your own path with the one you love—your destiny is yours to command.

Crossing paths with the desert’s most formidable souls—from ruthless leaders, aging heroes, to eloquent politicians. Declare war, or make peace and team up with rival factions. Yet, every choice carries a price.

Choose from 10 Heroes, each offering a specialized skill tree to master as you conquer cities and lands. Roam across a giant map to encounter various characters, enter deadly dungeons for boss fights and loot.

Unleash your creativity with our built-in visual MOD editor. Without needing to write a single line of code, you can modify or expand the game world, crafting your own legends and stories within this boundless exotic realm.
description_short: Bringing you to an exotic desert where you’ll recruit, train, and guide your troops into battle against rival cities and factions. Embark on an adventure that’s uniquely yours; Customizable characters, professions, and factions. The land is filled with a variety of hidden secrets.

upsells.name: Sands of Salzaar - The Ember Saga
部落与弯刀 - 胧境之冬
